title: Skinlogic: Non-surgical aesthetic medicine and skin and body treatments
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Skinlogic is truly grateful...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Skinlogic is truly grateful and humbled to be named the Best Aesthetics / Laser Clinic in George.


> Serving the public since 2012, Skinlogic is a full medical practice that specialises in non-surgical, medically endorsed, internationally renowned aesthetic medicine, as well as skin and body treatments - all based on proven scientific principles.


We aim to provide the best treatments for our patients, constantly striving for excellence.

The award confirms our ethos and inspires us to do even better.

We offer advanced skincare and body treatments - from medical aesthetics to facials and laser treatments - in a safe, friendly and discreet environment.

We consistently deliver outstanding service and results in a warm, friendly atmosphere.


> We do not do "make-overs". We prefer to enhance our patients’ innate beauty with precision and expertise to achieve natural-looking results.


While we deliver superior services using leading technology and quality products, our close-knit team truly cares about our patients’ physical and mental wellbeing.

In an ever evolving industry, we stay up to date with the latest innovations and do constant training in our field.

Skinlogic is the best in George because, as the longest-existing aesthetic practice in town, we are privileged to have the best team and technology to deliver the best results in aesthetic medicine – and the best patients!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
